name: tidy-formatter
description: Safe, modern beautifier for JS, CSS, HTML & JSON that respects your VS Code config — never auto-formats or hijacks your files unless you ask.

walkthroughs.title: Get started with Tidy Formatter
walkthroughs.description: Set up safe, consent-first formatting: opt in when you want, migrate from JS-CSS-HTML Formatter, and keep full control of format-on-save.

steps.title: Safety first
steps.description: Tidy never writes a file that fails an equivalence check against your original — file corruption is impossible by design.

steps.title: Use Tidy as your formatter
steps.description: Run [Tidy: Use Tidy as my Formatter](command:tidy.useAsFormatter) to opt in per language — fully reversible, nothing is written until you confirm.

steps.title: Format on save — your choice
steps.description: Tidy never enables Format On Save and never hooks save. Turn on $(gear) editor.formatOnSave yourself if you want it.

steps.title: Migrating from JS-CSS-HTML Formatter
steps.description: Run [Tidy: Migrate from JS-CSS-HTML Formatter](command:tidy.runMigration) to import your legacy .jsbeautifyrc options and switch over safely.

tidy.css.enable.description: Enable Tidy as a formatting provider for CSS.

tidy.scss.enable.description: Enable Tidy as a formatting provider for SCSS.

tidy.less.enable.description: Enable Tidy as a formatting provider for LESS.

tidy.html.enable.description: Enable Tidy as a formatting provider for HTML.

tidy.json.enable.description: Enable Tidy as a formatting provider for JSON.

tidy.jsonc.enable.description: Enable Tidy as a formatting provider for JSON with comments.

tidy.javascript.enable.description: Enable Tidy as a formatting provider for JavaScript.

tidy.typescript.enable.description: Enable Tidy as a formatting provider for TypeScript.

tidy.typescriptreact.enable.description: Enable Tidy as a formatting provider for TSX (TypeScript React).

tidy.javascriptreact.enable.description: Enable Tidy as a formatting provider for JSX (JavaScript React).

tidy.indent.description: Indentation size used when neither the editor nor a project config provides one (js-beautify indent_size).

tidy.wrap_line_length.description: Maximum characters per line before wrapping; 0 disables wrapping (js-beautify wrap_line_length).

tidy.wrap_attributes.description: How HTML attributes are wrapped (js-beautify wrap_attributes).

tidy.space_after_anon_function.description: Add a space after an anonymous function keyword (js-beautify space_after_anon_function).

tidy.end_of_line.description: Line-ending style applied to formatted output when no editor/project setting governs (lf or crlf).

tidy.preserve_newlines.description: Keep existing blank lines between statements/rules (js-beautify preserve_newlines).

tidy.max_preserve_newlines.description: Maximum number of consecutive blank lines to keep (js-beautify max_preserve_newlines).

tidy.indent_empty_lines.description: Keep indentation on otherwise-empty lines (js-beautify indent_empty_lines).

tidy.space_in_paren.description: Add padding spaces inside parentheses, e.g. f( a ) (js-beautify space_in_paren).

tidy.space_in_empty_paren.description: Keep a space inside an empty parentheses pair, e.g. f( ) (js-beautify space_in_empty_paren).

tidy.break_chained_methods.description: Break chained method calls across lines (js-beautify break_chained_methods).

tidy.keep_array_indentation.description: Preserve array element indentation as authored (js-beautify keep_array_indentation).

tidy.comma_first.description: Put commas at the start of the next line rather than the end (js-beautify comma_first).

tidy.operator_position.description: Where line-breaking operators are placed relative to the newline (js-beautify operator_position).

tidy.selector_separator_newline.description: Put each selector in a comma-separated group on its own line (js-beautify selector_separator_newline).

tidy.newline_between_rules.description: Insert a blank line between CSS rules (js-beautify newline_between_rules).

tidy.space_around_combinator.description: Put spaces around selector combinators, e.g. a > b (js-beautify space_around_combinator).

tidy.indent_scripts.description: How <script>/<style> contents are indented inside HTML (js-beautify indent_scripts).

tidy.wrap_attributes_indent_size.description: Indent size for wrapped HTML attributes (js-beautify wrap_attributes_indent_size).

tidy.prettier.printWidth.description: Target line width before Prettier wraps TS/JSX code (Prettier printWidth). Stylistic only.

tidy.prettier.semi.description: Print semicolons at the end of statements (Prettier semi). Stylistic only — does not change the AST.

tidy.prettier.singleQuote.description: Use single quotes instead of double quotes (Prettier singleQuote). Stylistic only.

tidy.prettier.jsxSingleQuote.description: Use single quotes in JSX attributes (Prettier jsxSingleQuote). Stylistic only.

tidy.prettier.trailingComma.description: Where trailing commas are printed (Prettier trailingComma). Stylistic only.

tidy.prettier.bracketSpacing.description: Print spaces inside object braces, e.g. { a } (Prettier bracketSpacing). Stylistic only.

tidy.prettier.bracketSameLine.description: Put the > of a multi-line element on the last attribute line (Prettier bracketSameLine). Stylistic only.

tidy.prettier.arrowParens.description: Include parentheses around a sole arrow-function parameter (Prettier arrowParens). Stylistic only.

tidy.maxFileSizeKB.description: Skip formatting (with a notification) for documents larger than this size in KB. 0 disables the size guard.

tidy.editorconfig.description: Read the project's .editorconfig cascade (honouring root=true) and let it override plain VS Code settings. Disable to ignore .editorconfig entirely. Workspace .editorconfig is always ignored in Restricted Mode.

tidy.soukformatrc.description: Read the project's .soukformatrc file (JSONC) for per-language formatting options and glob overrides, layered above .editorconfig. Disable to ignore .soukformatrc entirely. A workspace .soukformatrc is always ignored in Restricted Mode.

tidy.respectSoukformatignore.description: Skip formatting files matched by the project's .soukformatignore (gitignore syntax), so Tidy leaves them byte-identical. Disable to format every file regardless. A workspace .soukformatignore is always ignored in Restricted Mode.

enumDescriptions: Show a one-time notification when this workspace already configures another formatter (Prettier, Biome, dprint). Tidy never takes over — your default formatter is unchanged.
Do not notify, but acknowledge another formatter is configured. Tidy still never disables itself or changes any setting.
Ignore detection of other formatters entirely (no notification).
tidy.deferToOtherFormatters.description: How Tidy reacts when another formatter (Prettier, Biome, dprint) is already configured in the workspace. Tidy NEVER changes editor.defaultFormatter or disables itself automatically — this only controls a one-time, informational notification.
